@flightSearch @oneway Scenario Outline: Search one way flight # src/test/resources/Features/FlightSearch.feature:20 [INFO ] 2024-06-27 11:48:30.099 [TestNG-test=Test-1] Hooks - Browser launched [INFO ] 2024-06-27 11:48:31.983 [TestNG-test=Test-1] HomePageSteps - Entered base URL Given User is on home page # com.snd.stepDefinitions.HomePageSteps.user_is_on_home_page() And User clicks on flights tab # com.snd.stepDefinitions.FlightSearchSteps.user_clicks_on_flights_tab() [INFO ] 2024-06-27 11:48:34.684 [TestNG-test=Test-1] FlightSearchSteps - Clicked on one way option And User clicks on One way option # com.snd.stepDefinitions.FlightSearchSteps.user_clicks_on_one_way_option() [INFO ] 2024-06-27 11:48:34.948 [TestNG-test=Test-1] FlightSearchSteps - Cabin class selected And User selects "Economy Premium" Cabin class # com.snd.stepDefinitions.FlightSearchSteps.user_selects_cabin_class(java.lang.String) [INFO ] 2024-06-27 11:48:35.711 [TestNG-test=Test-1] FlightSearchSteps - Entered origin And User enters Origin as "LHR" # com.snd.stepDefinitions.FlightSearchSteps.user_enters_origin_as(java.lang.String) [INFO ] 2024-06-27 11:48:36.241 [TestNG-test=Test-1] FlightSearchSteps -
